info.longName: iShares iBonds Oct 2035 Term TIPS ETF

funds_data.description: The index seeks to track the investment results of an index composed of inflation-protected U.S. Treasury bonds maturing in 2035. The fund will invest at least 80% of its assets in the component securities of the underlying index, and the fund will invest at least 90% of its assets in U.S. Treasury securities that BFA believes will help the fund track the underlying index.

top_holdings.Name: BlackRock Cash Funds Treasury SL Agency
